summary: Full UI Spec Verification for Quotes and Orders Pages - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Quotes page has 7 columns (Date, Quote No, Type, Amount, Valid Until, Status, Payment), drawer with Customer Info, Quote Details (with Prepared By), Line Items table, Totals, Accept/Reject/Download buttons, expiry countdown. Orders page has 6 columns (Date, Order No, Source, Amount, Payment, Fulfillment), drawer with Order Summary, Customer, PROMINENT Sales Person section with Call/Email/WhatsApp, Fulfillment (vendor - not prominent), Items, Timeline, Need Help section. NO payment buttons in Orders. AI widget correctly hidden on all 3 transaction pages.
critical_code_review_comments: QuotesPageV2.jsx: Full-width table with Date, Quote No, Type, Amount, Valid Until, Status, Payment columns - VERIFIED
QuotesPageV2.jsx: QuoteDrawer has Customer section with name, email, phone, address - VERIFIED
QuotesPageV2.jsx: QuoteDrawer has Quote Details with Issued, Valid Until, Prepared by, Type - VERIFIED
QuotesPageV2.jsx: QuoteDrawer has Line Items table with Item, Qty, Unit Price, Amount columns - VERIFIED
QuotesPageV2.jsx: QuoteDrawer has Totals section with Subtotal, VAT, Total - VERIFIED
QuotesPageV2.jsx: QuoteDrawer shows Accept Quote + Reject Quote + Download Quote buttons for pending quotes - VERIFIED
QuotesPageV2.jsx: QuoteDrawer shows expiry countdown (e.g., 'Expires in 28 days') for pending quotes - VERIFIED
OrdersPageV2.jsx: Full-width table with Date, Order No, Source, Amount, Payment, Fulfillment columns - VERIFIED
OrdersPageV2.jsx: OrderDrawer has Order Summary section with Order, Date, Source, Invoice/Quote links - VERIFIED
OrdersPageV2.jsx: OrderDrawer has Customer section with name, phone, address - VERIFIED
OrdersPageV2.jsx: OrderDrawer has PROMINENT 'Assigned Sales Person' section with border-2 styling - VERIFIED
OrdersPageV2.jsx: Sales Person section has Call/Email/WhatsApp buttons with data-testid attributes - VERIFIED
OrdersPageV2.jsx: OrderDrawer has Fulfillment section (vendor - NOT prominent, just text) - VERIFIED
OrdersPageV2.jsx: OrderDrawer has Timeline showing Order Created, Payment Approved, Vendor Assigned, Work Started, Completed - VERIFIED
OrdersPageV2.jsx: OrderDrawer has 'Need help?' section at bottom with Call Sales and WhatsApp buttons - VERIFIED
OrdersPageV2.jsx: NO payment buttons in Order drawer - VERIFIED
All 3 pages (Invoices, Quotes, Orders) use same visual system - full table, no action column, click row opens drawer - VERIFIED
AI widget NOT visible on /dashboard/quotes and /dashboard/orders - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quotes and Orders pages fully rewritten to match detailed spec. All drawer sections verified. Sales person fields are empty in DB so drawer shows 'Konekt Sales Team' as placeholder. All 3 transaction pages use consistent visual system.

GATE_1_QUOTES_TABLE_COLUMNS.details: Table has 7 columns: Date, Quote No, Type, Amount, Valid Until, Status, Payment

GATE_2_QUOTE_DRAWER_CUSTOMER.details: Customer section shows name (Demo Customer), email (demo.customer@konekt.com), phone (+255712345678), address (456 Minimal Street, Arusha)

GATE_3_QUOTE_DRAWER_DETAILS.details: Quote Details section shows Issued date, Valid Until, Prepared by (Konekt Sales Team), Type (Product)

GATE_4_QUOTE_DRAWER_LINE_ITEMS.details: Line Items table with Item, Qty, Unit Price, Amount columns

GATE_5_QUOTE_DRAWER_TOTALS.details: Totals section shows Subtotal, VAT (18%), Total

GATE_6_QUOTE_DRAWER_ACTIONS.details: Accept Quote, Reject Quote, Download Quote buttons visible for pending quotes

GATE_7_QUOTE_EXPIRY_COUNTDOWN.details: Expiry countdown shows 'Expires in 28 days' for pending quotes

GATE_8_ORDERS_TABLE_COLUMNS.details: Table has 6 columns: Date, Order No, Source, Amount, Payment, Fulfillment

GATE_9_ORDER_DRAWER_SUMMARY.details: Order Summary section shows Order number, Date, Source, Invoice/Quote links

GATE_10_ORDER_DRAWER_CUSTOMER.details: Customer section shows name, phone, address with MapPin icon

GATE_11_ORDER_DRAWER_SALES_PERSON.details: PROMINENT 'Assigned Sales Person' section with border-2 styling, shows Konekt Sales Team, phone, email, Call/Email/WhatsApp buttons

GATE_12_ORDER_DRAWER_FULFILLMENT.details: Fulfillment section shows Vendor (Pending assignment), Payment status, Fulfillment status - NOT prominent

GATE_13_ORDER_DRAWER_TIMELINE.details: Timeline shows Order Created, Payment Approved, Vendor Assigned, Work Started, Completed with checkmarks for completed steps

GATE_14_ORDER_DRAWER_NEED_HELP.details: 'Need help with this order?' section at bottom with Call Sales and WhatsApp buttons

GATE_15_ORDER_NO_PAYMENT_BUTTONS.details: NO payment buttons in Order drawer - verified pay-invoice-btn is None

GATE_16_AI_WIDGET_HIDDEN.details: AI Chat Widget NOT visible on /dashboard/quotes and /dashboard/orders

GATE_17_VISUAL_SYSTEM_CONSISTENCY.details: All 3 pages (Invoices, Quotes, Orders) use same visual system: full table, no action column, click row opens right drawer with branded header
